name: opensupport-agentops-architecture
title: Phase 1: Chatwoot + Tenant + BYOK Foundation
description: Narrow the full OpenSupport AgentOps PRD into the original Phase 1 milestone: Chatwoot local deployment, connector contracts, tenant model config, LLM call logging, PII mask, and trace schema. User registration and non-core AgentOps features are explicitly out of scope.
